summary: First-finish smoke test on T.V Reddy Telugu marketing generator. Backend (generate/regenerate/history/delete) and frontend (form, tabs, poster templates, history drawer, regenerate) all working end-to-end with real Gemini 2.5 Flash output in Telugu script.
passed: POST /api/generate with valid Samsung TV input returns full Telugu JSON with all 9 keys
POST /api/generate with short offer ('a') returns 400 'Offer description is required'
POST /api/history saves item and returns id; GET /api/history lists it; DELETE /api/history/{id} returns {deleted:1}
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY present in /app/backend/.env; Gemini integration produces Telugu-script output
Home page loads, header shows 'T.V Reddy Electronics'
All 7 form/action data-testids present (offer-input, category/audience/tone-select, notes-input, generate-btn, history-btn)
History drawer opens on click and shows [data-testid=history-drawer]
Generate flow: click generate -> content tabs render within 60s; toast 'Content generated successfully!' shown
WhatsApp tab has copy-whatsapp-btn and share-whatsapp-btn
FB & IG tab has copy-facebook-btn and copy-instagram-btn
Poster tab renders all 6 template thumbnails (template-festival/emi/exchange/repair/spotlight/newstock) and download-poster-btn
Zero console errors during load and full generation flow
notes: Did not verify actual clipboard-copy behavior, html2canvas PNG download bytes, or voice input (Web Speech API requires mic permissions). Regenerate button click-through not exercised end-to-end but endpoint verified via API path (regenerate reuses generate).
